title: Crispy Coriander Poached Delight
description: A salty and nostalgic Japanese dish featuring crispy coriander leaves poached in a low-sodium-friendly broth, reminiscent of traditional Japanese soups.

ingredients.name: Coriander leaves
ingredients.notes: Approximately 3-4 tablespoons of coriander seeds can be substituted if not using fresh leaves.

instructions: Bring the broth to a boil and reduce heat to low. Add soy sauce and stir well.

Gently add chopped coriander leaves to the simmering broth, covering them with a lid and cooking until they are tender yet crisp, about 15 minutes. Adjust seasoning as needed based on taste preference.
Preheat grill or skillet for a drizzle of oil if necessary to lightly toast Sriramurthi slices (around medium-high heat).
Serve the poached coriander leaves over grilled or toasted Sriramurthi with green onions garnished.
